title: Shot Diagram Recovery and Desktop Zoom
notes: The Shot Diagram engine is once again served unchanged instead of being rewritten by the service worker.
The unified minimal menu is injected through the Shot Diagram wrapper after the stable engine loads.
Shot Info now includes a Back to Menu button.
Mouse-wheel and trackpad scrolling now zoom the Drill Log and Shot Diagram canvases on desktop.
No saved-hole data, export formats, calculations, calibration settings, or backup formats were changed.
